subject: Re: Masa...
body:
Trying to get you in with Masa crowd. Some resistance though, due to all the headlines/controversy - - as you might expect. I tell them about your relationship with Saudis/Gates/Trump crowd, but still doubts. Working on it!

Landon Thomas, Jr.  
Financial Reporter  
New York Times  
████████████
http://topics.nytimes.com/top/reference/timestopics/people/t/landon_jr_thomas/index.html
